sanskrit: न मे विदुः सुरगणाः प्रभवं न महर्षयः । अहमादिर्हि देवानां महर्षीणां च सर्वशः ॥
hindiTranslation: मेरे प्रकट होनेको न देवता जानते हैं और न महर्षि क्योंकि मैं सब प्रकारसे देवताओं और महर्षियोंका आदि हूँ ॥
englishTranslation: The hosts of devas do not know my origin, nor do the great sages, for I am the beginning of the devas and the great sages in every way.
essence: Even the highest knowers stand inside the source they seek.
speaker: Krishna
